name: Rare: Creatures of the Photo Ark
original_name: Rare: Creatures of the Photo Ark
overview: Travel with renowned photographer Joel Sartore as he photographs at-risk and rare species in the wild, in zoos, in nature preserves and explores his Photo Ark initiative, revealing why ensuring species' future matters to us all.

trailers.title: RARE: CREATURES OF THE PHOTO ARK | Official Trailer | PBS
